calendar.matters:
Minor'S Compromise In Scd.
Off Calendar Jun-16-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Dave Davenport.
Paul Vaillancourt, Esq. for Petitioner: Michele Byers, present as Guardian at litem for: Matthew Byers, a minor Claimant, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.
Attorney's Fees $933.22
Costs $978.35
A net balance of $2,799.68 to be deposited into a blocked account with Washington Mutual Bank, 3449 Castro Valley Blvd., Castro Valley, CA. 94546, no withdrawals shall be made without a written court order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Order Approving Compromise of Claim and Order to Deposit Money Into Blocked Account signed in open court.

Minor'S Compromise In Scd.
Off Calendar May-31-2005 Continued To Jun-16-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Kathy Kollehner.
Julie Grebel, Esq. for Petitioner: Michele Byers, present as Guardian at litem for: Matther Byers, a minor Claimant, was sworn and examined.
Matter is continued to June 16, 2005 at 9:00 A.M. in Dept. 218, for Petitioner to re-file the petition with updated Mandatory Judicial Council of California's form.
Appearance of the Minor is waived.
